tldr: Migrate from Braze to Airship by swapping SDKs, re-importing user profiles and tags, and rebuilding Canvases as Airship Journeys.
why_switch: Mature iOS/Android/Web SDKs with broad platform coverage
Lower entry pricing tier than Braze's typical enterprise model
Reduce dependence on Braze's Canvas-centric model
SMS/email/push under one Airship account if needed
Contractual or commercial fit with Airship
what_to_export: User profiles keyed by external ID
Subscription groups / channels and consent state
export_method: Use Braze's data export capabilities (e.g. user export and event/segment exports) per Braze's official documentation to pull profiles, attributes, events, and subscription state. Document Canvas flows and template content from the dashboard since structural exports are limited. Save outputs as JSON/CSV ready for transformation.
import_method: Install Airship's iOS/Android/Web SDKs following Airship's official setup docs and identify users via Named User. Backfill custom attributes, tags, and events using Airship's server-side APIs as documented. Recreate segments and Journeys in Airship; rebuild push and in-app templates from the exported content.

concept_mapping.note: Use the same stable identifier to preserve identity
Booleans often map to tags; scalars stay as attributes
Re-import consent and channel preferences explicitly
Rebuild step-by-step; trigger and branching semantics differ
Re-emit from clients and/or backfill via API
Closest equivalent depends on use case

gotchas: Push tokens must be re-collected by the new SDK — coordinate cutover
Canvas → Journey is a manual rebuild; trigger windows and exits behave differently
Subscription state must migrate cleanly to avoid sending to unsubscribed users
Content Cards have no perfect equivalent — design choice required
Braze Liquid templating won't work in Airship; rewrite templates
Dual-running risks duplicate sends — gate with feature flags

email.subject: Braze → Airship migration plan
email.body:
Hi team,

We're planning to migrate engagement messaging from Braze to Airship. The goal is to leverage Airship's mature SDKs and a more flexible commercial model.

Approach:
1) Export user profiles, attributes, events, and subscription state from Braze.
2) Integrate Airship SDKs (iOS/Android/Web) using our existing external IDs as Named Users.
3) Backfill attributes, tags, and events via Airship APIs.
4) Rebuild Canvases as Airship Journeys, plus push and in-app templates.
5) Dual-run for one release cycle, then cut over.

Estimated effort: 4-10 weeks depending on Canvas complexity. I'll send a detailed checklist covering identity, consent, templating, and parity testing.

Thanks
